queries.question: List all casting directors and also show location scouts with a salary of $80,000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Casting_Directors.name
FROM Casting_Directors
UNION
SELECT Location_Scouts.name
FROM Location_Scouts
WHERE Location_Scouts.Salary = 80000.0

queries.question: Show all casting directors and location scouts whose salary equals $80,000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Casting_Directors.name
FROM Casting_Directors
WHERE Casting_Directors.Salary = 80000.0
UNION
SELECT Location_Scouts.name
FROM Location_Scouts
WHERE Location_Scouts.Salary = 80000.0

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all casting directors and location scouts whose salary equals $80,000.
